text: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
zh: 听录音,然后回答这个问题。

text: Why is Nigel a lucky man?
zh: 为什么奈杰尔是个幸运的人?

text: Nigel is our new next-door neighbour.
zh: 奈杰尔是我们隔壁的新邻居。
他曾在英国皇家空军服役。

text: He will fly to New York next month.
The month after next he'll fly to Tokyo.
zh: 下下个月他要飞往东京。

text: At the moment, he's in Madrid.
He flew to Spain a week ago.
zh: 一周前他飞去了西班牙。

text: He'll return to London the week after next.
and he has already been to nearly every country in the world.
zh: 却几乎去过世界上所有的国家。

text: Nigel is a very lucky man.
zh: 奈杰尔是个非常幸运的人。

text: But his wife isn't very lucky.
zh: 但他的妻子却不太走运。
